---
title: "CouplingCondition"
sidebar: references
---

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_references.py; edit specs/dasdae-inventory.yml instead. -->

Acoustic coupling condition for an interval of an optical path.

Aliases: `Coup`, `Coupling`

## Attributes

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `optical_length` | float | Optical path interval length described by this coupling in meters. |
| `coupling_type` | Literal[VALID_COUPLING_TYPES] | Controlled coupling category. Allowed values are conduit, trench, outside_borehole_casing, wireline, surface, coiled, and other. |
| `medium` | str | Surrounding medium, such as soil, rock, or steel. |
| `attachment` | str | Attachment method, such as clamped or bonded. |
| `depth` | float \| None | Depth in meters relative to the local surface or deployment reference, when relevant. |

## Contains

_None._

## Contained By

- [OpticalPath](OpticalPath.qmd)

## References

_None._

## Referenced By

_None._
